description.value: Aura strong (no school); CL 17th; Weight 5 lbs. Price varies by specific type: Lesser dazing metamagic rod 14,000 gp Dazing metamagic rod 54,000 gp Greater metamagic rod 121,500 gp DESCRIPTION The wielder can cast up to three spells per day that daze affected creatures as though using the Dazing Spell feat. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Rod, Dazing Spell Cost varies by specific type: Lesser dazing metamagic rod 7,000 gp Dazing metamagic rod 27,000 gp Greater dazing metamagic rod 60,750 gp
